chapter: Chapter 3: Pair of Linear Equations in Two Variables

questions.question: What is a linear equation in two variables?
questions.answer: An equation of the form ax + by + c = 0, where a and b are not both zero.

questions.question: What is meant by a pair of linear equations?
questions.answer: Two linear equations involving the same two variables.

questions.question: What is the graph of a linear equation?
questions.answer: The graph of a linear equation is a straight line.

questions.question: What does the solution of a pair of linear equations represent graphically?
questions.answer: It represents the point of intersection of the two lines.

questions.question: What is meant by a consistent pair of linear equations?
questions.answer: A pair of linear equations having at least one solution.

questions.question: What is meant by an inconsistent pair of linear equations?
questions.answer: A pair of linear equations having no solution.

questions.question: How many solutions can a pair of linear equations have at most?
questions.answer: A pair of linear equations can have infinitely many solutions.

questions.question: What kind of lines represent a unique solution?
questions.answer: Intersecting lines represent a unique solution.

questions.question: What kind of lines represent no solution?
questions.answer: Parallel lines represent no solution.

questions.question: What kind of lines represent infinitely many solutions?
questions.answer: Coincident lines represent infinitely many solutions.

questions.question: Which method uses graphs to solve equations?
questions.answer: Graphical method.

questions.question: Which method eliminates one variable?
questions.answer: Elimination method.

questions.question: Which method substitutes one variable into another equation?
questions.answer: Substitution method.

questions.question: What type of solutions does graphical method give?
questions.answer: Graphical method gives approximate solutions.

questions.question: What type of solutions do algebraic methods give?
questions.answer: Algebraic methods give exact solutions.

questions.question: What is an ordered pair?
questions.answer: An ordered pair (x, y) represents a solution of the equations.

questions.question: What is the degree of a linear equation?
questions.answer: The degree of a linear equation is one.

questions.question: How many equations are there in a pair of linear equations?
questions.answer: There are two equations.

questions.question: What does a common solution satisfy?
questions.answer: A common solution satisfies both equations.

questions.question: What is the shape of parallel lines?
questions.answer: Parallel lines never intersect.

questions.question: What is the slope of parallel lines?
questions.answer: Parallel lines have the same slope.

questions.question: What is the slope of intersecting lines?
questions.answer: Intersecting lines have different slopes.

questions.question: What does intersection of two graphs indicate?
questions.answer: It indicates the solution of the equations.

questions.question: Which method is easiest when a coefficient is 1?
questions.answer: Substitution method.

questions.question: Linear equations are used to solve what type of problems?
questions.answer: Problems involving two unknown quantities.
